title: Nova Roma Steam Store Page
notes: Official Steam store page. Use for release state, genre tags, developer/publisher, supported languages, Steam features, and official high-level feature claims only. notes: Use for broad system categories and official wiki navigation only. The wiki is marked as a work in progress, so use conservative confidence and avoid exact optimization claims unless independently verified.
